problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Transcranial. Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
